pn532_create_spi.message0: Create PN532 NFC module %1 using SPI interface SCK:%2 MISO:%3 MOSI:%4 SS:%5
pn532_create_spi.tooltip: Create PN532 NFC module object, using software SPI interface

pn532_create_spi_hw.message0: Create PN532 NFC module %1 using hardware SPI interface SS:%2
pn532_create_spi_hw.tooltip: Create a PN532 NFC module object, using the hardware SPI interface

pn532_create_i2c.message0: Create PN532 NFC module %1 using I2C interface (simplified version)
pn532_create_i2c.tooltip: Create a PN532 NFC module object, using the I2C interface (without connecting the IRQ and RESET pins)

pn532_create_i2c_pins.message0: Create PN532 NFC module %1 using I2C interface IRQ:%2 RESET:%3
pn532_create_i2c_pins.tooltip: Create PN532 NFC module object, using I2C interface (with IRQ and RESET pins)

pn532_begin.tooltip: Initialize the PN532 module, which must be called in setup

pn532_get_firmware_version.message0: Get the PN532 module %1 firmware version
pn532_get_firmware_version.tooltip: Get the firmware version number of the PN532 module

pn532_sam_config.tooltip: Configuring the SAM (Secure Access Module) of the PN532 module

pn532_set_passive_retries.message0: Set the PN532 module %1 and the number of passive activation retries %2
pn532_set_passive_retries.tooltip: Set the maximum number of retries when reading a card

pn532_read_passive_target.message0: Read PN532 module %1 Passive target ID Card type %2 Timeout %3 milliseconds
pn532_read_passive_target.tooltip: Read the ID of the passive target and return whether the reading is successful.

pn532_get_uid_length.message0: Get the length of the most recently read UID
pn532_get_uid_length.tooltip: Get the last successfully read UID length (bytes)

pn532_get_uid_byte.tooltip: Get the byte value at the position specified by UID

pn532_mifare_classic_authenticate.message0: Mifare Classic Authentication %1 Sector %2 Key Type %3 Key %4
pn532_mifare_classic_authenticate.tooltip: Authenticate designated sectors of Mifare Classic cards

pn532_mifare_classic_read_block.tooltip: Read the contents of the specified data block of the Mifare Classic card

pn532_mifare_classic_write_block.message0: Write Mifare Classic %1 data block %2 data %3
pn532_mifare_classic_write_block.tooltip: Write data to the specified data block of the Mifare Classic card

pn532_mifare_ultralight_read_page.tooltip: Read the contents of the specified page of the Mifare Ultralight card

pn532_mifare_ultralight_write_page.tooltip: Write data to the specified page of the Mifare Ultralight card

pn532_ntag2xx_read_page.tooltip: Read the content of the page specified by the NTAG2xx tag

pn532_ntag2xx_write_page.tooltip: Write data to the page specified by the NTAG2xx tag

pn532_mifare_classic_write_ndef_uri.message0: Write Mifare Classic %1 NDEF URI Sector %2 URI Prefix %3 URL %4
pn532_mifare_classic_write_ndef_uri.tooltip: Write URI record in NDEF format to Mifare Classic card

pn532_ntag2xx_write_ndef_uri.message0: Write NTAG2xx %1 NDEF URI URI prefix %2 URL %3
pn532_ntag2xx_write_ndef_uri.tooltip: Write NDEF-formatted URI records to NTAG2xx tags

pn532_mifare_classic_format_ndef.message0: Format Mifare Classic %1 to NDEF format
pn532_mifare_classic_format_ndef.tooltip: Format Mifare Classic card to NDEF format
